input.claim: The AI equity cycle moved from NVIDIA to memory/AMD, then to semiconductor equipment names such as LRCX, AMAT, and KLAC.
evidence_summary: NVIDIA reported record Q1 FY2027 revenue and data-center revenue, showing AI data-center demand as the main operating driver.
AMD's IR materials describe Q1 2026 as driven by accelerating AI infrastructure demand and data-center growth.
Micron reported record fiscal Q3 2026 results and highlighted data-center memory demand.
Applied Materials reported Q2 FY2026 revenue growth and strong profitability.
Lam Research reported March 2026 quarter results above the prior quarter on revenue and non-GAAP net income.
KLA reported Q2 FY2026 revenue of $3.297B with most revenue from semiconductor process control.
